plugin.name: Notion Meeting Sync
plugin.description: Syncs Fireflies and native Notion meeting recordings into NotePlan as markdown notes with tasks.
plugin.author: Ian Soper

plugin.settings.title: Notion API Token
plugin.settings.description: Your Notion integration token (starts with ntn_ or secret_). Get one at notion.so/my-integrations.

plugin.settings.title: Fireflies Database ID
plugin.settings.description: The Notion database ID for your Fireflies meetings. Find it in the database URL: notion.so/<workspace>/<DATABASE_ID>?v=... Leave blank to skip Fireflies sync.

plugin.settings.title: Sync Folder
plugin.settings.description: NotePlan folder to sync meetings into. Must be an existing folder path exactly as it appears in NotePlan (e.g. "0_Inbox" or "1_Projects/Work"). The plugin will log available folders on each sync.

plugin.settings.title: Last Sync Timestamp
plugin.settings.description: Set automatically by the plugin. Clear this to force a full re-sync on next run.

plugin.commands.name: Sync Notion Meetings
plugin.commands.description: Import new/updated meetings from Notion (Fireflies + native recordings) into your configured folder

plugin.commands.name: Notion Sync: Clear Last Sync
plugin.commands.description: Reset the last sync timestamp so the next run imports all meetings from scratch
